name: 0-universal-context
description: Universal AI context and documentation system

setup_instructions.summary: This directory should be connected to the 0-universal-context GitHub repository.
setup_instructions.auto_setup: Run ~/dawson-workspace/setup-git-repos.sh from any OS to automatically set up all git repos.
verify: git remote -v   # Should show origin pointing to 0-universal-context
git status      # Should show 'On branch main' and 'up to date'

notes.syncthing: The .git directory is excluded from Syncthing sync (via .stignore) to prevent conflicts. Each OS maintains its own .git directory.
notes.workflow: File changes sync via Syncthing. Run 'git pull' after booting to get any commits made on other OS. Run 'git push' after committing to share with other OS.
